benefits.trial: 7-day free trial - no credit card required
benefits.instant: Create a store and manage products instantly

start.note: After 7 days, you can upgrade to a paid plan to continue using the service.

description.multiStore: Switch to manage another store's data

toast.loadStoresError: Unable to load stores. Please try again.
toast.storeNotActivated: This store is not activated because subscription payment hasn't been completed. Please complete payment when creating the store or contact support.
toast.trialExpired: This store's trial has expired. Please purchase a plan before switching to this store.
toast.subscriptionExpired: This store's subscription has expired. Please renew before switching to this store.
toast.switchBlocked: Unable to switch due to plan limits. Please check the subscription.
toast.switchError: Unable to switch store. Please try again.

subscription.title: Subscription
subscription.unavailable: Unable to retrieve subscription status for this store.

toggleDialog.descriptionDeactivate: Are you sure you want to deactivate store "{{name}}"? It will no longer be active after deactivation.
toggleDialog.descriptionActivate: Are you sure you want to activate store "{{name}}"? It will become active again.

paymentDialog.title: QR payment (SePay)
paymentDialog.description: Scan the QR code or transfer using the information below to activate the store.

toast.notYet: Payment not recorded yet. Please try again later.
toast.checkFailed: Unable to check status. Please try again later.

toast.planRequired: Please select a plan to create a store.
toast.createSuccessNeedPay: Store "{{name}}" created. Please complete payment using the information below.
toast.createSuccessOpeningPayment: Store "{{name}}" created. Opening the payment page.
toast.createSuccessButPaymentInitFailed: Store created but payment initialization failed. Please retry from the Subscription page.
toast.paymentInitFailed: Unable to initialize payment for the new store. Please retry from the Subscription page.
toast.createSuccessNoPayment: Store "{{name}}" created. To use it, purchase a subscription plan from the Subscription page.
toast.paymentInitFailedLater: Unable to initialize payment. Please try again later.

descriptions.mandatory: You need to create at least one store to continue using the system.
descriptions.default: Fill in the store information below.
